name: Chocolate Leaf Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Make Flaky Pastry Pie Dough: In a large bowl, combine 2 1/2 cups all-purpose flour and 3/4 teaspoon salt. Cut in the cold vegetable shortening until the mixture resembles coarse meal with some pieces of shortening still visible.
2. Sprinkle 5 tablespoons ice water over the mixture, tossing to moisten evenly. Gather the dough into a ball; add up to 1 tablespoon more ice water if the dough is dry. Divide the dough in half and pat each piece into a 6-inch disk. Wrap separately in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Roll out one piece of dough on a floured surface until it fits a pie plate. With the other piece, roll out and cut leaf patterns to create light vein-like designs. Fit onto the pie plate and freeze.
4. Pre-bake at 350°F (175°C) until golden brown.
5. Make Chocolate Filling: Simmer heavy cream with scraped vanilla bean, then add melted chocolate and sugar.
